use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages requiring dynamic visual appeal
Website backgrounds for SaaS and fintech companies to convey innovation
Interactive background elements for creative portfolios and media sites
Decorative canvas animation for modern web applications needing visual depth
Background component for tech-focused landing pages and marketing sites
ai_summary: A canvas-based particle animation component using particles.js that renders interactive floating particles with connecting lines. Features hover-to-grab and click-to-push interactions with smooth opacity and size animations. Supports dual color themes for dark mode (cyan tones) and light mode (blue shades), with particles that bounce off canvas edges and respond to window resizing. Ideal for adding dynamic visual interest to landing pages and hero sections.
